# Third-Party Source Backups

This directory stores third-party source backups used to reproduce the NFS
Th-232 analysis environment.

The code here is not original work of this repository unless explicitly stated.
Each package directory must keep its own backup notice with upstream origin,
local provenance, and build instructions.

Current packages:

- `mfmlib-backup-25.11.07`: local backup of GANIL MFMlib used by the working
  NFS analysis machine.
